testcase.name: test_register_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_auth.py:49: in test_register_success assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Bu kullanıcı adı zaten alınmış"} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_username_409
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_auth.py:67: in test_register_duplicate_username_409 assert r1.status_code == 200 E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_phase3_auth.py:105: in registered_user assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_me_with_cookie_and_logout
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_auth.py:141: in test_me_with_cookie_and_logout assert body is not None E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_forgot_no_telegram_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_auth.py:200: in test_forgot_no_telegram_400 assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_clip_submit_no_telegram_403
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase3_auth.py:284: in test_clip_submit_no_telegram_403 assert r.status_code == 403 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
